name: Telegram UI
description: Gives agents Telegram UI tools: inline button prompts, reactions, pinning, unpinning, locations, dice, and a full self-test routine.

chatId.description: Telegram chat ID. Falls back to channels.telegram.allowFrom[0].

botToken.description: Telegram bot token. Falls back to channels.telegram.token or TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN env.

staleMins.description: Minutes before a pending button prompt is considered stale and cleaned up.

chatId.label: Telegram Chat ID
chatId.help: Auto-detected from channels.telegram.allowFrom if not set.

botToken.label: Telegram Bot Token
botToken.help: Only needed if different from the main Telegram channel token.
